summary: Iteration 222 - Generator System (Tiered Payable Bonuses) Testing Complete. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: SuanpanMixer Console slide-over panel works correctly with 8 generator cards displayed. Orbital pages (Botany, Trade, Codex) render correctly with z-index fix applied (bottom-20 right-14).

issues: The 'Full View' buttons at bottom-20 right-14 are very close to the 'Made with Emergent' badge. While they don't fully overlap, they are in close proximity. Consider moving buttons further up (bottom-24) or left (right-20) for better visual separation.

critical_code_review_comments: generators.py: GENERATOR_CATALOG has 8 generators across 3 types (sub_harmonic: 3, mantra_extension: 3, ultra_lossless: 2)
generators.py: Tier-gating correctly implemented - sovereign generators blocked for archivist users (403 response)
generators.py: Duplicate purchase prevention returns 400 with 'Generator already owned' message
generators.py: Bloom coefficients computed using hybrid deterministic+RNG logic (hexagram factor + seeded hash)
SuanpanMixer.js: Console slide-over panel opens from right side with 320px width
SuanpanMixer.js: Generator cards grouped by type (Sub-Harmonic, Mantra Extension, Ultra-Lossless)
SuanpanMixer.js: Owned generators show toggle button, non-owned show buy button with credit price
SuanpanMixer.js: Tier-locked generators show crown icon and are not purchasable
SuanpanMixer.js: Active generators show bloom glow effect (animated box-shadow)
BotanyOrbital.js: z-index fix applied - button at bottom-20 right-14 (was bottom-16 right-4)
TradeCircleOrbital.js: z-index fix applied - button at bottom-20 right-14
CodexOrbital.js: z-index fix applied - button at bottom-20 right-14
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (Archivist tier, ~39 credits)
seed_data_creation: None - test user already owns sub-harmonic-01 generator
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 222 verified: (1) GET /api/trade-circle/generators/catalog returns 8 generators with ownership, tier-locking, affordability status. (2) POST /api/trade-circle/purchase validates tier, checks credits, deducts, unlocks asset with bloom coefficients. (3) GET /api/vault/generators returns owned generators with bloom coefficients. (4) POST /api/vault/generators/toggle toggles active state. (5) Duplicate purchase returns 400. (6) Tier-gating returns 403 for sovereign generators. (7) SuanpanMixer Console slide-over at /suanpan route shows all 8 generators grouped by type. (8) Owned generator (sub-harmonic-01) shows toggle button. (9) Orbital pages have z-index fix at bottom-20 right-14. (10) Auth uses Bearer token in Authorization header.

catalog_endpoint.details: GET /api/trade-circle/generators/catalog returns 200 with 8 generators, user_tier, user_credits

catalog_tier_locking.details: Sovereign generators (sub-harmonic-03, mantra-ext-03, lossless-02) show tier_locked: true for archivist user

catalog_ownership.details: sub-harmonic-01 shows owned: true for test user

purchase_duplicate_prevention.details: POST /api/trade-circle/purchase returns 400 'Generator already owned' for sub-harmonic-01

purchase_tier_gating.details: POST /api/trade-circle/purchase returns 403 'Requires Sovereign tier' for sub-harmonic-03

vault_generators.details: GET /api/vault/generators returns owned generators with bloom_coefficients (reverb_color_mod, decay_rate_mod, bloom_seed, hex_factor)

toggle_generator.details: POST /api/vault/generators/toggle changes active state and persists to database

toggle_non_owned.details: POST /api/vault/generators/toggle returns 404 'Generator not owned' for non-owned generator

suanpan_console_button.details: Console button visible at top-right of /suanpan page with data-testid='console-toggle-btn'

suanpan_console_panel.details: Console slide-over panel opens from right with 320px width, shows 8 generator cards

generator_card_states.details: Cards show correct states: owned (toggle button), purchasable (buy button with price), locked (crown icon)

botany_orbital_zindex.details: Full Botany View button at bottom-20 right-14, visible and clickable

trade_orbital_zindex.details: Full Trade View button at bottom-20 right-14, visible and clickable

codex_orbital_zindex.details: Full Codex View button at bottom-20 right-14, visible and clickable
